prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

tasks.description: Execute the defense corpus task using Capability 24, which is registered under Agent 24. The input will be in text format and output expected in JSON.
Use the registered capability to process the defense corpus. Ensure input is provided in text format and output will be structured as JSON.
Leverage the capability to complete the defense corpus task. Input is expected in text format, and output will be returned as JSON.
